title: Release a claim by issue id regardless of owner
description:
Allow releasing a claim by issue id (no lease UUID), regardless of lease owner, with an audit trail.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] `jit claim release <issue-id>` resolves the issue's active lease and releases it without requiring the lease UUID.
- [ ] Release succeeds regardless of the lease owner, and the acting identity is recorded for audit.
- [ ] A clear error is returned when the issue has no active lease.

## Notes

Reuses the existing `force_evict_lease` path; no new coordinator method.
